mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_NO, U.USER_GRADE FROM PI_USER U WHERE U.USER_NO = #{user_no} AND U.ACC_YN NOT IN ('R', 'N')

SELECT DISTINCT U.USER_NO, U.USER_ID, U.JIKWEE, U.JIKGUK, U.BOSS_NAME, U.USER_GRADE, U.USER_NAME, U.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, U.REGDATE, 'Y' AS PASSWORD, U.USER_GRADE, GU.GRADE_NAME, REPLACE(IFNULL(U.ACCESS_IP, ''), ' ', '') AS ACCESS_IP, '' AS OFFICE_NM, U.ENDDATE, U.STARTDATE, U.FAILED_COUNT, if(NOW() > LOCK_DATE, 'N', 'Y') LOCK_ACCOUNT, CASE WHEN U.PWD_UPT_DT < DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -90 DAY) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS PWD_EXPIRE, U.USER_PHONE AS USER_PHONE, U.SOSOK, U.USER_PHONE, U.USER_EMAIL, PWD_RESET_STATUS, U.LOGINDATE, U.LOCK_STATUS FROM PI_USER U, PI_GROUP G, PI_GRADE_USER GU WHERE U.INSA_CODE = G.INSA_CODE AND U.USER_GRADE = GU.GRADE_NO AND U.ACC_YN NOT IN ('R', 'N') AND U.USER_NO = (#{user_no})
